ranked_movies.title: Spy
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively praised in the top post for its brilliant action-comedy blend, with specific acclaim for Jason Statham's hilarious performance and Rose Byrne's comedic force. It's described as underrated and a comfort watch.

ranked_movies.title: Dumb and Dumber
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of a highly-upvoted post analyzing its comedic genius. Hailed as a perfect comedy, an all-time great, and a favorite for its smart writing, chemistry between leads, and memorable gags.

ranked_movies.title: Friendship
ranked_movies.reason: A major point of discussion with polarized reactions. Praised by fans of Tim Robinson's specific absurdist and cringe humor, but also noted for being deeply unsettling and not for everyone, generating significant conversation.

ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended across multiple threads as a classic that consistently makes people laugh. Its quotable lines and slapstick humor are highlighted as timeless.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Lebowski
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned multiple times as a user's favorite comedy. Recommended for its clever dialogue, quirky characters, and status as a cult classic from the Coen brothers.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a first-choice comedy recommendation. Praised for its sharp writing, brilliant editing, and perfect blend of action and comedy from Edgar Wright.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a top favorite comedy in the AskReddit thread. Recognized as a groundbreaking and hilarious satire from Mel Brooks.

ranked_movies.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
ranked_movies.reason: A frequently mentioned favorite in the AskReddit thread. Celebrated for its absurdist humor, quotable lines, and enduring legacy.

ranked_movies.title: Anchorman
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended alongside Superbad as a top comedy. Noted for its iconic performance by Will Ferrell and memorable, absurd quotes.

ranked_movies.title: Tropic Thunder
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a personal favorite comedy. Praised for its satirical take on Hollywood, great ensemble cast, and over-the-top humor.

ranked_movies.title: Game Night
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a recent (2018) comedy that is hilarious and well-made. Noted for its clever premise and execution.

ranked_movies.title: The Nice Guys
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as one of the funniest movies of the last decade. Praised for the chemistry between Ryan Gosling and Russell Crowe and its sharp script.

ranked_movies.title: Billu
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of a highly-upvoted post celebrating it as a hidden gem in Priyadarshan's filmography, specifically for Irrfan Khan's performance and its heartfelt story.

ranked_movies.title: Ghostbusters
ranked_movies.reason: Declared a favorite comedy that 'isn't even close' by one user. Recognized as a perfect blend of sci-fi, comedy, and heart.

ranked_movies.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a perfect post-breakup movie that functions as both a soul-crusher and a hilarious comedy, effectively covering both requested extremes.

ranked_movies.title: Superbad
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a top favorite comedy alongside Anchorman. Celebrated as a defining teen comedy of its generation.

ranked_movies.title: Step Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Included in a list of favorite comedies. Noted for its quotable lines and the hilarious dynamic between Will Ferrell and John C. Reilly.

ranked_movies.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a classic comedy that is both heartwarming and hilarious, perfect for lifting spirits.

ranked_movies.title: In Bruges
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a fun, edgy, shocking black comedy with incredibly dark humor and a ridiculous series of events.

ranked_movies.title: The Princess Bride
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a delightful mix of romance, comedy, and adventure, making it a perfect lighthearted watch.
